use_cases: Display status indicators on user profiles, cards, or list items
Show notification counts or categorical labels in dashboards
Indicate success, warning, or error feedback states in forms
Create interactive button-like badge elements with disabled states
Add semantic color variants for informational, warning, or destructive alerts
ai_summary: A flexible badge component with multiple color variants for displaying status labels, notification counts, and feedback states. Supports primary, secondary, destructive, success, warning, and info variants with appearance options including default, light, outline, and ghost styles. Features accessibility-focused focus ring states and disabled state handling.
